title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010. (2) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1 18th October, 2010, vide notification No. S.O 2569(E), dated 18th October, 2010, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
